description: next-evals agent-029: use cache directive and revalidateTag profile for eventual catalog refresh

assertions.name: includes(/['"]use cache['"];?/)
groupPath: Catalog reads use use-cache directive and products cache tag

assertions.name: includes(/cacheTag\s*\(\s*['"]products['"]\s*\)/)
groupPath: Catalog reads use use-cache directive and products cache tag

assertions.name: includes(/import.*getAllProducts.*lib\/db|from.*lib\/db/)
isDefined(inline form-triggered Server Action exists in one file)
groupPath: Inline form-triggered Server Action flow exists

assertions.name: isDefined(a file calls revalidateTag)
groupPath: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/import.*revalidateTag.*from\s+['"]next\/cache['"]/)
groupPath: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/revalidateTag\s*\(/)
groupPath: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/revalidateTag\s*\(\s*['"]products['"]\s*,/)
groupPath: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: excludes(/\bupdateTag\s*\(/)
groupPath: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile
